reason: Verify new components follow named exports, cn(), shadcn/ui conventions, no inline styles
Verify search/sort/filter state uses URL params (useSearchParams), not component-local state for URL-visible state
Code quality standards — lint/typecheck/forbidden patterns check
Verify SQL uses parameterized queries (not string formatting), proper LIKE escaping for search
Verify search/sort params validated at API boundary, proper HTTPException on invalid input
Verify search/sort/filter params have consistent contracts across backend routes → db → frontend client → types
Verify all acceptance criteria met — checklist against PRD requirements
